scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:basic" "npm run dev:securities" "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev:crm" "npm run dev:service" "npm run dev:operations"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../main && npm install && cd ../apps/basic && npm install && cd ../securities && npm install && cd ../cms && npm install && cd ../crm && npm install && cd ../service && npm install && cd ../operations && npm install
